reviews.review_msg: Very entertaining in lecture, down to earth and funny. One or two questions in the exam that directly come from activities in lecture but the entire lecture recordings are posted online, though I would reccomend going as I had a lot of fun listening to him. Also he gave out a lot of candy so that was a plus.

Extremely tricky tests, hard to get high marks. Midterms are 50 minutes each, but most of people cannot finish all. Tests are out of 22, counts 17% of your final grade, almost 1:1. There are two MC questions, 2 marks each, but answers are a-e, have to select all correct answers to get full marks, avoid him if you dont need to take this course.

tests are complete nonsense, says he won't curve but more than 70% of the class can't even pass his midterms. Absolute joke of a course with the way he writes exams for it nothing he teaches is ever on it but rather full of niche random super specific questions. If u want a decent grade do not take this course with this prof

The most engaging prof in the STAT department! and I've had many. This guy explains things in a way that makes concepts stick in your brain for a long time. I always looked forward going to class. There were 4 quizzes and a final. They were tough but all fair. Try out one of his classes if you can. I can't recommend a prof enough!

This man is so entertaining, genuinely made coming to class a memorable thing. His TA's this semester also seem to be very down to earth and I appreciate that he makes little worksheets that aren't overwhelming. There is lots of new vocabulary for this class that you need to learn, but his office hours are very helpful and accessible.

such an amazing prof, he was always very helpful. his lectures were well-organised and structured perfectly for the course. his exams were a good format, and were reasonable in terms of content per test. he was quick to respond to emails and gave great feedback and help when asked. love him, would recommend him to anyone looking for this credit!

Tom is an angel! Lectures (for those who actually attend) were engaging and you can tell how passionate he is about what he is teaching. If you do not like math, but need a B-Sci credit, take this with Tom!!! 2 midterms, 1 final, all open book/note. Small assignments for each unit. Marks came back very efficiently. 10/10 would recommend this dude!
